description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 28 hrs 12 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 4 hrs 30 mins. His coding was mainly in Python, Markdown, TypeScript, and SQL. The data shows activity across 3 projects, but does not include any public GitHub commits, repos, PRs, or new repos.
